'''Shudderup''' was a genre of [[Music/Legends|music]] that was known by the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Naboo (people)/Legends|residents]]. In the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks's]] youth, he spent some [[Time/Legends|time]] as a vagrant shudderup [[Musician/Legends|musician]] whom passersby would pay for him to stop playing.<ref name="Characters" />

Another one of Naboo's natives, [[Bongiovi]], was a shudderup [[Quetarra|quetarrist]] and singer. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Bongiovi was one of several Naboo musicians who coaxed [[symponik]] musician [[Beezar Pert/Legends|Beezar Pert]] out of retirement for a special concert in the [[Palace Plaza/Legends|Palace Plaza]] of<ref name="ST">{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-an-overview-of-popular-music-and-musicians-in-a-galaxy-far-far-away-part-1|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref> the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]],<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref> [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], to honor the war orphans on both sides of the conflict.<ref name="ST" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shudderup was created for the [[2002]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', written by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="ST" />
